form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (30.87) in a Grade 5, finishing a 6 length seventh. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and three places from seven starts. Has ability but looking elsewhere this time.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a strong early split and went straight to the front, scoring an all the way win (29.83) over 515m at Sandown. Has hit winning form and can go on with it.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Finished in the minors at big odds last time when second (30.46) at this track, making it two placings on end. Has a low draw. Will need plenty of luck.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage fourth last time out over 515m at Sandown. Likely to find this too tough.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Went up with lids and slow to begin.

form.formComment: Hit the frame again last time when third (26.16) at Geelong, making it three minor placings in a row. Awkward draw to overcome. Top-three aspirations.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 7th over 515m at Sandown beaten 7 lengths (29.85) behind Flying Ducati in a Grade 5 FIN on April 9. Last couple have been below par. Deserves another chance.

form.formComment: Lines up chasing another win after scoring over 525m at this track in 30.21, set up by a fast early sectional. Winner at the latest run in one of the quickest times on the card. Can measure up again.

form.formComment: Was strongly supported last time but ran below expectations when fourth over 460m at Geelong in 26.16. Forgive that last start failure.
